visualizations.title: Fraction to Percentage General Conversion
visualizations.description: The formula that converts any ratio or fraction into its percentage value.

steps.explanation: Divide the numerator by the denominator, then multiply by 100 and append the percent symbol.

visualizations.title: Dual Liquid Scale: Fractions vs Percentages
visualizations.description: Watch the cylinder fill up and notice how the fractional heights correspond to matching percentage marks.
